alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Codex establishes Maximum Levels (MLs) for contaminants in food and feed commodities to protect human health. The Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF) establishes and endorses these levels.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Allergen List - Allergen declaration on labels
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. GSO 9:2022 on labelling of prepackaged foodstuffs is expected to include requirements for allergen declaration.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. This regulation covers general labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs, which would include information such as ingredients, nutritional facts, and potentially warnings.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation sets out the general requirements for labeling of prepackaged foodstuffs. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full document.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies mandatory expiration dates for food products. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full document.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation establishes microbiological limits for various foodstuffs and food ingredients intended for human consumption and use in the food industry. Specific limits must be verified by consulting the full document.

alerts.title: Added: India Allergen List - Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declaration required. Mandatory declaration of specified allergens on food product labels is required as per the FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations. The exact list of allergens and declaration format must be verified against the regulation.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Manual review required. Automated extraction failed: Expected ':' after property name in JSON at position 2199 (line 44 column 5)

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Class II chemical preservatives (e.g., sorbic acid, benzoic acid)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Not to be directly added when manufacturing the kueh; can be directly added to fillings and toppings within prescribed regulatory limits. For details on the use of preservatives in kueh, download the provided slides.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All food businesses must comply with regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in the list of ingredients on food labels.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory labeling if present as ingredient or food additive. These allergens require mandatory labeling when present as an ingredient or food additive in prepackaged foods.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Mandatory labeling if residue sulphur dioxide is 10 mg/kg or more in prepackaged foods.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from production, import, or sale. Certain foods are explicitly prohibited from production, import, or sale in Thailand.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances and delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use in food. Prohibited substances are listed in 21 CFR Part 189. Delisted color additives are in 21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major food allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame. Sesame was added as the 9th major food allergen by the FASTER Act, effective January 1, 2023.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - "Gluten-free" claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet FDA's defined standard for gluten content. FDA issued a final rule defining "gluten-free" for food labeling on August 2, 2013, and compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods on August 12, 2020.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Facilities must implement written procedures to control allergen cross-contact and ensure accurate labeling. Part of the "Current Good Manufacturing Practice, Hazard Analysis, and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for Human Food" rule (CGMP & PC rule, 21 CFR part 117).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on labels. Identified as allergenic substances.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of major food allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared. Declaration methods: in parentheses following ingredient name (e.g., "lecithin (soy)") OR in a "contains" statement immediately after/next to ingredient list (e.g., "Contains wheat, milk, and soy."). Specific type/species required for tree nuts, fish, and Crustacean shellfish.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be identified on labels. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Must be declared on food labels when present at or above this concentration.

alerts.title: Added: China Additive Limits - Food additive use
alerts.details: New: Must comply with GB 2760-2015. GB 2760-2015 is the national standard for the use of food additives in China. Specific limits for various additives and food categories are detailed within this standard.

alerts.title: Added: China Labelling Requirement - Food safety standards
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The National Health Commission is responsible for developing and reviewing national food safety standards. Specific limits and requirements are detailed in these standards.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the database and its Preamble for specific provisions.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The database provides information on approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites, and process hygiene criteria for foods.

alerts.title: Added: India Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific permitted food additives and their maximum limits for various food categories must be verified against the detailed schedules and provisions of the FSSAI Food Additives Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: India Labelling Requirement - General Labelling
alerts.details: New: Compliance required. All aspects of labelling and display for food products must comply with the FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations. Specific requirements for font size, information placement, and other declarations need to be verified.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as Food Additive
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This circular specifically addresses Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive, indicating that BPOM regulates the production, import, registration, and circulation of food additives. Specific provisions must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Permitted Food Additives and their limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required. BPOM regulates food additives in processed foods. Specific permitted additives and their maximum limits must be verified by consulting the relevant 'Pangan Olahan' regulations available on the JDIH BPOM website.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Allergen List - Mandatory allergen declaration
alerts.details: New: Verification required. BPOM requires allergen declarations for processed foods. Specific requirements for allergen lists and labelling must be verified by consulting the relevant 'Pangan Olahan' regulations available on the JDIH BPOM website.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - Chemical and physical contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. BPOM regulates contaminant limits for processed foods. Specific limits must be verified by consulting the relevant 'Pangan Olahan' regulations available on the JDIH BPOM website.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Category Classification
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation defines the categories for processed foods, which is fundamental for applying specific additive, contaminant, or other limits and for correct labelling.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General labelling information and warnings
alerts.details: New: Verification required. BPOM sets general labelling requirements and warnings for processed foods. Specific requirements must be verified by consulting the relevant 'Pangan Olahan' regulations available on the JDIH BPOM website.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - Microbiological contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. BPOM regulates microbiological limits for processed foods. Specific limits must be verified by consulting the relevant 'Pangan Olahan' regulations available on the JDIH BPOM website.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Sodium content
alerts.details: New: Verification required. BPOM may regulate salt/sodium limits for processed foods. Specific limits must be verified by consulting the relevant 'Pangan Olahan' regulations available on the JDIH BPOM website.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Multiple Class II chemical preservatives
alerts.details: New: Use the Calculation Tool for Class II Chemical Preservatives to determine permitted levels. Applies if two or more Class II chemical preservatives (e.g., sorbic acid or benzoic acid) are used.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.details: New: Verification required from SFA's linked documents. Refers to various limits for different types of contaminants. Businesses should be aware of common contaminants and conduct laboratory tests as needed.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Heavy metals
alerts.details: New: Verification required from SFA's linked document. Refer to the 'Heavy metals' document for specific limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins and Marine biotoxins
alerts.details: New: Verification required from SFA's linked document. Refer to the 'Mycotoxins and Marine biotoxins' document for specific limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Other incidental constituents
alerts.details: New: Verification required from SFA's linked document. Refer to the 'Other incidental constituents' document for specific limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Pesticide residues
alerts.details: New: Verification required from Singapore's regulatory limits and Codex MRLs. Refer to 'Singapore's regulatory limits' and 'Codex MRLs' if no regulatory limits are specified in the Food Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Veterinary drug residues
alerts.details: New: Verification required from SFA's linked document and website for MRLs. SFA has established a list of maximum residue limits (MRLs) for veterinary drug residues for compliance by food businesses.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Microbiology Limits - Microbiological standards
alerts.details: New: Verification required from SFA's linked documents. Refer to 'Microbiological standards' documents for 'Ready-to-eat food' and 'Non-ready-to-eat food'.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Additive Limits - γ-Aminobutyric Acid (GABA)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific use restrictions and labeling requirements for γ-Aminobutyric Acid (GABA) as a food ingredient must be verified against the full regulation.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Contaminant Limits - Pesticide Residues
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for pesticide residues in foods must be verified against the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Labelling Requirement - Nutrition Claims
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific requirements for nutrition claims on prepackaged food products must be verified against the full regulation.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Labelling Requirement - Precautionary allergen labeling for cross-contamination
alerts.details: New: Suggested statement: “The plant, equipment or production line used to produce the product is also used to process○○” or synonymous terms.. Suggested for food products with a risk of allergen cross-contamination.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits and permitted uses for food additives must be verified in the relevant regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for contaminants in food must be verified in the relevant standards.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Toxic Substances and Veterinary Drug Residues
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for toxic substances and veterinary drug residues in food must be verified in the relevant standards.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - General Food and Nutrition Labeling
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Requirements for food labeling and nutrition labeling, including allergen declarations and specific warnings, must be verified in the relevant regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Permitted/Non-permitted Ingredients
alerts.details: New: Verification required. A list of permitted and non-permitted ingredients for use in food must be verified.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Microbiology Limits - Pathogenic Microorganisms
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific limits for pathogenic microorganisms in food must be verified in the relevant standards.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Food additives and color additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required against FDA regulations and inventories. Includes substances listed in 21 CFR Parts 172, 173, 73, 74, 182, 184, 181, and flavoring substances evaluated by FEMA and JECFA.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Poisonous or deleterious substances
alerts.details: New: Verification required against FDA's Chemical Contaminants Transparency Tool and associated guidance/regulations. Includes tolerances, action levels, guidance levels, derived intervention levels, recommended maximum levels, and advisory levels. Tolerances and action levels are defined in 21 CFR parts 109 and 509.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Microbiology Limits - Total Plate Count (TPC)
alerts.details: New: Not required to be tested. This is an exemption for RTE food.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Cephalopods and cephalopod products, Spiral shells and Spiral shell products thereof, Seeds and seed products (excluding highly refined/purified sunflower seed oil), Kiwis and kiwi products thereof
alerts.details: New: Recommended labeling if present as ingredient or food additive. These allergens are recommended for labeling when present as an ingredient or food additive in prepackaged foods.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Advisory statements (e.g., "may contain [allergen]")
alerts.details: New: Not required by law. Can be used to address unavoidable cross-contact if good manufacturing practices are followed and must be truthful and not misleading. Not a substitute for GMPs.
